title: ProofVault Trust Case v1.0.1
subtitle: Release-bound evidence with a deliberately bounded guarantee surface
summary: A reproducible trust case that reduces unearned claim surface through a pinned specimen, drift detection, verifier coverage, and a hosted-green release path.
description: ProofVault turns trust claims into inspectable release evidence by narrowing the guarantee boundary: a pinned specimen, regeneration and drift checks, and public provenance tied to an exact hosted-green non-debug commit.
